content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "CAUTIOUS",
    "reasoning": "Nifty -0.90%, Bank Nifty -0.84%, PSU Bank -1.91%, Realty -2.45%, Energy -1.44% — broad-based weakness with VIX +8.14% to 18.21 signaling rising anxiety. Pharma (+0.52%), IT (+0.26%) and selective FMCG showing defensive bid. Existing book is largely defensive (FMCG/Pharma/Healthcare/IT) which is the right cohort for this tape; focus is on trailing SLs on winners (COFORGE, MARICO, LAURUSLABS) and managing risk on losers rather than aggressive new entries into a -0.9% Nifty session.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 23845,
      "nifty_resistance": 24100
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1355.00,
      "new_target": 1500.00,
      "confidence": 0.80,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+9.9% winner. Q4 PAT +144% QoQ beat, brokerage targets 1690-2020. Current SL 1358.97 is above entry — already at lock-in. CMP 1385.50, SL 1355 leaves 2.2% trail-gap (above 1% floor). Tight enough to protect ~7.6% locked gain, loose enough not to self-stop on intraday noise. Target retained at 1500."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 838.00,
      "new_target": 870.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+3.4% winner, CMP 847.35 at 52w high. Q4 print strong (rev +22%, India volume +9%). Trail SL from 832 to 838 (entry 820 + 2.2% buffer above entry); CMP 847 - SL 838 = 1.1% gap, just above the 1% trail-floor. Locks in +2.2% minimum, retains upside to 870 target. CPI May 12 not a binary for Marico individually."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "LAURUSLABS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1248.00,
      "new_target": 1320.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+3.6% winner, pharma sector at 52w high. CDMO +36%, FY26 PAT +148%. Trail SL from 1255 to 1248 — wait, 1255 stored is above entry 1226. Holding SL at 1255 actually already above entry; CMP 1270, SL 1255 = 1.2% gap. No-op MODIFY would be sub-0.5% movement. Reverting to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "LAURUSLABS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Correction: stored SL 1255 already above entry 1226 (locks +2.4%). CMP 1270, SL 1255 gives 1.2% trail-gap — above 1% floor. No material change warranted; HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-1.2%, CMP 123.64 vs SL 121.00 = 2.1% buffer. Gold consolidation phase, VIX rising +8% supports defensive holding. SL placement intact, no new info post-entry. Respect the SL."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "SRF",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",

    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "POLYCAB",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-0.4%, CMP 9050 vs SL 8950 = 1.1% buffer. Today touched 9136 (52w high). Q4 PAT +7% lagged revenue +27% — modest margin compression. Capital goods sector at ATH but stock holding. UltraTech competitive overhang Dec 2026 known. HOLD, do not front-run SL."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "BAJAJ-AUTO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-1.5%, CMP 10599.50 vs SL 10440 = 1.5% buffer. Q4 standalone PAT +34%, buyback at 12000 record date May 29 creates price floor. Auto sector -1.29% today but BAJAJ-AUTO -0.05% (relative outperformer). HOLD into buyback record date."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "DABUR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-1.5%, CMP 478 vs SL 468 = 2.1% buffer. Q4 PAT +16%, FY27 guidance raised to low-double-digit. Today +1.70% — recovering. Thesis intact. HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "TATACONSUM",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+0.4%, CMP 1257 vs SL 1198 = 4.7% buffer. Q4 PAT +21.5%, hit 52w high today +9.18%. FMCG sector outperforming. Recent entry, ample SL room. HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "CGPOWER",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-0.2%, CMP 865 vs SL 850 = 1.7% buffer. Order book +61% YoY, PAT +34%, near ATH 872. Capital goods sector at record highs. Thesis fully intact. HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "APOLLOHOSP",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-0.2%, CMP 8085 vs SL 7950 = 1.7% buffer. Q4 results May 20 — outside 3-session binary window (8 sessions away). Today +3.16%, hit 52w high 8144. Healthcare defensive bid. HOLD; will reassess closer to results."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-0.1%, CMP 1874.70 vs SL 1830 = 2.4% buffer. Today +2.20%, hit 52w high 1885. Q4 results May 21 — outside 3-session window. Pharma sector at 52w high. Organon deal narrative active. HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "LALPATHLAB",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-1.2%, CMP 1668.70 vs SL 1610 = 3.5% buffer. Research now flags BEARISH (-0.08): Q4 PAT -15% YoY, lagging Metropolis/Thyrocare. However today +6.59% (sector momentum lifting it). SL placement absorbs further weakness; respect SL rather than front-run. HOLD but flagged for closer monitoring."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",

    },
    {
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 838.00,
      "reasoning": "Trail SL above entry by 2.2%, locks +2.2% minimum on +3.4% winner."
    },
    {

      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Defensive ETF, SL intact, VIX rising favors gold hedge."
    },

      "new_stop_loss": null,

    },
    {
      "symbol": "DABUR",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Recovering today; Q4 thesis intact; SL adequate."
    },
    {

      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 1255 already above entry, 1.2% gap from CMP — no-op MODIFY avoided."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "TATACONSUM",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "+9.18% intraday on Q4 beat; recent entry, ample SL room."
    },
    {

      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Order book +61%, near ATH, thesis intact."
    },
    {

      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,

    },
    {

      "new_stop_loss": null,

    },

      "symbol": "LALPATHLAB",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Research flagged BEARISH but today +6.59% in sector lift; SL absorbs further weakness."

  "watchlist_notes": "Several BULLISH candidates surfaced (COFORGE confirmed, MARICO confirmed, AFFLE +12% post Q4, THERMAX gapped but faded -7% from high, MCX, TATACONSUM already held). AFFLE/THERMAX rejected: extreme intraday volatility (AFFLE 1486-1686 range = 13% intraday whipsaw; THERMAX 4545-4880 = 7% fade from high) into a -0.9% Nifty session — chasing 12% gap-ups in a CAUTIOUS tape with VIX +8% is the wrong setup. AFFLE additionally has warrant dilution overhang (2.25% promoter stake increase). INFY/HCLTECH not assessed in deep-dive batch but COFORGE already represents IT exposure at +9.9%. BIOCON/TORNTPHARM pharma — SUNPHARMA + LAURUSLABS already provide sector exposure; cluster cap considerations apply (Rule 10). APTUS housing finance: 6.6x volume notable but NBFC exposure absent from book — would consider on a confirmed pullback to support, not at intraday high. Pending TATACONSUM BUY @ 1240 LIMIT placed earlier — CMP 1257, order won't fill at 1240 without a pullback. Will let it sit; thesis intact, no need to chase higher. HFCL MIS @ 133.50 from 7733m ago is stale — CANCEL next cycle if still open.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Day-22, deployment 52.5%, well below 80% soft target but in a CAUTIOUS tape with VIX +8%, Nifty -0.9%, broad sector weakness — under-deployment is justified by the macro read, not anchoring. Cumulative P&L -2.60% reflects difficult chop; 5-day win rate 12% is a tell that new-entry quality has been poor — discipline now is to let winners run (COFORGE, MARICO, LAURUSLABS, TATACONSUM all green) with trailed SLs and avoid stacking marginal-confidence entries into a weak tape. 13 existing positions cover FMCG, Pharma, Healthcare, IT, Capital Goods, Auto, Specialty Chem, Gold — adequate diversification. Cash ₹462K preserved for cleaner setups when VIX normalizes. No new entries this cycle: AFFLE/THERMAX too extended intraday, MCX/BIOCON/APTUS not in deep-dive data with strong enough conviction modifier to clear the higher bar a weak-tape day demands. Rule 18 check: explicit per-name reject reasons provided in watchlist_notes; this is risk-off justified by tape, not anchored conservatism."
}
